[Core System Features] Feature #3: [Brand Kit Interface] Standard interface (BrandKitExport) that all brand kits must implement Verification: TypeScript interface exported for brand kit authors; Clear documentation of required vs optional fields; Validation against interface at load time Criteria: Manual verification required

[Core System Features] Feature #4: [Dynamic Import System] Lazy loading of brand kits using dynamic imports to avoid bundle bloat Verification: Brand kit code is NOT in main bundle; Dynamic import() used for brand kit loading; Separate chunk created for brand kit Criteria: Manual verification required
